description_long: This is a luxury wristwatch featuring a gold-toned case with a polished finish and a black textured leather strap. The watch face is black with gold hour markers, three subdials, and luminous hands, giving it a chronograph appearance. The crown and two pushers are located on the right side of the case, adding to its functional complexity. The strap has a crocodile pattern and a traditional buckle closure, with visible stitching on the inner side. The dial displays a brand logo and name at the 12 o'clock position, and the subdials are symmetrically arranged for a balanced look. The overall design is elegant and suitable for formal or upscale urban settings.
description: A gold luxury wristwatch with a black crocodile-pattern leather strap, black chronograph dial, and gold accents. Features include three subdials, luminous hands, and a traditional buckle clasp.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black dial with gold indices, three subdials, luminous hands, and the brand logo at 12 o'clock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold case thickness, crown, and pushers, as well as the curved leather strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black crocodile-pattern leather strap, buckle, and strap holes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth gold case edge and the inner leather strap lining.
attribute_brand_logo: A gold shield-shaped emblem and the text 'AKRIBOS' are present at the 12 o'clock position on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is black with gold stick indices, three subdials arranged in a chronograph layout, and luminous gold hands. The subdials are symmetrically placed, and the overall style is classic chronograph with a polished, elegant finish.
attribute_strap_type: Black crocodile-pattern leather strap with visible stitching and a traditional buckle.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three gold hands (hour, minute, second), three subdials for chronograph functions, and luminous elements on the hands.
